mapper.update: UPDATE position_salary SET base_salary = #{baseSalary} WHERE position_id = #{positionId}
UPDATE department_bonus SET bonus = #{bonus} WHERE department_id = #{departmentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO salary_history (emp_id, payment_date, amount) SELECT e.emp_id, #{paymentDate}, ps.base_salary FROM employee e JOIN position_salary ps ON e.position_id = ps.position_id;
INSERT INTO bonus_history (emp_id, payment_date, amount) SELECT e.emp_id, #{paymentDate}, db.bonus FROM employee e JOIN department_bonus db ON e.department_id = db.department_id;
